title: selaginella schiedeana
intro: Selaginella schiedeana, a type of evergreen, perennial plant in the Selaginellaceae family, is a species of spikemoss that is native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Selaginella schiedeana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
